headline: Strait Of Hormuz May Stay Shut Until Second Half Of 2026 Amid Middle East, Baker Hughes CFO Says
summary: Baker Hughes Co. is factoring a prolonged Strait of Hormuz closure into its financial guidance, with CFO Ahmed Moghal telling investors Friday the waterway may not fully reopen until the second half of the year. “There’s still a great deal of uncertainty regarding, ultimately, the duration and depth of the conflict,” Moghal said on the company’s first-quarter earnings call. CEO Lorenzo Simonelli also said that geopolitical risk is now an enduring feature of oil and gas markets. He noted that the
